notes: Argentina were near full-strength despite pre-tournament concerns: Messi (mild hamstring), Álvarez (ankle) and Martínez (fractured finger) all cleared to play, with Tagliafico monitored but available; Otamendi served a one-match suspension (red card vs Ecuador in qualifying). Algeria's sole confirmed absence was LB Ramy Bensebaini (ankle injury, ruled out), leaving Petkovic without a key left-back option.
home_scorers: Lionel Messi (captain/talisman, penalties, set-piece threat, generational form)
Julián Álvarez (dynamic striker, high press, box presence)
Lautaro Martínez (backup striker option, clinical finisher)
away_scorers: Mohamed Amoura (leading striker, top scorer in qualifying with 10 goals)
Riyad Mahrez (captain, creative winger, free-kick and set-piece threat)
Ibrahim Maza (exciting young forward, dubbed 'Mazadona', breakout candidate)
